global.style: 16px-tile pixel art, hard 1px black outline, readable silhouette at native size, transparent background, no anti-aliasing, no dithering gradients wider than 2 colors
notes: DÛM RUNNER: sun-scorched alien ruin, scrap-industrial survivors, CRT terminal accents
world sprites are billboards in a 2.5D raycaster — silhouette reads from any yaw
light source top-left unless the slot says otherwise

enemy:chaser_melee.subject: rat-like tunnel scavenger, hunched quadruped, matted fur over exposed scrap-metal spine implants, glowing purple eyes

building:workbench.subject: scrap-built workbench: steel table, bolted legs, vise on one corner, scattered tools, oil stains

material:scrap.subject: small pile of jagged salvaged metal plates and bent rebar

prop:prop_tree.subject: sun-bleached dead tree, twisted bare branches, cracked pale bark
